overall.description: A gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from a sunny coastal road through an intersection, then transitioning into the dense urban core of Night City. The journey progresses from open waterfront views with a visible roller coaster through elevated highway underpasses and into narrow neon-lit canyons between towering skyscrapers.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the overhead bridge structure
passing underneath the concrete bridge into a covered section

agents.ego_description: following a red vehicle along the coastal road toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: red truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with open levels
large amusement park roller coaster structure visible in the distance
concrete overpass bridge spanning the road ahead
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti murals

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a sunny coastal highway approaching a concrete underpass. A modern parking structure looms on the right while a roller coaster is visible in the distance. The scene transitions into shadow as the vehicle passes beneath the bridge, with graffiti-covered walls on the left.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at the intersection
traffic light changes to green, proceeding through intersection
turning right onto the waterfront road lined with palm trees

agents.ego_description: stopping at a red light at the coastal intersection, then proceeding and turning right along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the road along the waterfront
traffic signal showing red then green
open water visible beyond the palm trees and promenade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the vehicle approaches a busy coastal intersection with a traffic light. After stopping at the red light and proceeding on green, the vehicle turns right onto a waterfront road lined with palm trees, with the ocean visible to the right and the roller coaster now visible to the left.

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway structure
pedestrian crossing the road ahead from right to left

agents.ego_description: navigating through the shadowed corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns for the overhead highway
underside of the elevated highway deck casting deep shadows
utilitarian industrial facades visible alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a massive elevated highway system, transitioning from bright sunlight to deep shadow. Massive concrete pillars line the road while industrial buildings appear on the left. A pedestrian crosses the road ahead as the vehicle continues through the underpass corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon with holographic billboards

events.description: exiting the underpass into a narrow street lined with towering buildings and bright billboards
neon holographic signs illuminating the street with artificial colored light

agents.ego_description: cruising through the dense urban canyon surrounded by towering advertisements and skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: oncoming car passing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying Milfguard advertisement with 30% off text
various glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
tall buildings forming a narrow canyon on both sides of the street
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the vehicle enters a dense urban canyon lined with massive holographic billboards including a prominent Milfguard advertisement. Neon signs cast colored light onto the street while skyscrapers tower on both sides. An elevated pedestrian walkway spans the road above as the vehicle navigates through the narrow canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown street with towering skyscrapers

events.description: entering a darker section of the urban canyon with less direct light
stopping at traffic light behind other vehicles at the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through the deep urban canyon and stopping at a traffic intersection behind other vehicles

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead stopped at the red light

entered.detail: extremely tall downtown buildings creating a deep urban canyon
intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks in the distance
ground floor commercial storefronts at the base of the towers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through an increasingly dark urban canyon formed by dense skyscrapers. Street-level shops line the base of the towers as the vehicle approaches an intersection. The scene ends with the vehicle stopping behind other traffic at a red light, surrounded by the towering downtown architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transforms from a bright, open coastal highway into the claustrophobic, neon-lit canyons of a dense urban core. It begins under a sunny sky, passing a modern parking structure and a distant roller coaster before dipping into the shadows of a graffiti-covered concrete underpass. As the vehicle emerges and navigates a palm-lined waterfront intersection, the bright daylight soon fades again as the camera drives beneath a massive elevated highway system flanked by industrial buildings and concrete pillars. The scene then shifts abruptly from these industrial shadows into a vibrant urban canyon dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards, including a prominent Milfguard advertisement. Finally, the environment grows increasingly dark and enclosed as the vehicle weaves past street-level shops and elevated walkways, eventually coming to a halt in the dense traffic of the downtown district.
